== topology ==
[Error] g3rs-topology/no-nested-workspaces nested/Cargo.toml Nested workspace `nested` is forbidden
  `nested/Cargo.toml` declares a nested workspace under `.`. Cargo does not support nested workspaces. Remove the `[workspace]` section from this Cargo.toml, or move it so it is not nested under `.`.
[Error] g3rs-topology/no-nested-guardrail3-rs-toml nested/guardrail3-rs.toml Nested adopted Rust unit `nested` is forbidden
  `nested/guardrail3-rs.toml` declares a nested adopted Rust unit under `.`. Nested guardrail3 adoption breaks ownership routing. Remove `nested/guardrail3-rs.toml`, or move the inner unit so it is not nested under `.`.
[Error] g3rs-topology/workspace-local-file-placement nested/guardrail3-rs.toml `cargo` file `nested/guardrail3-rs.toml` is illegally placed
  `nested/guardrail3-rs.toml` is attached to non-member root `nested`. Workspace-local `cargo` files must live at the workspace root `.`.
[Error] g3rs-topology/workspace-local-file-placement nested/guardrail3-rs.toml `deps` file `nested/guardrail3-rs.toml` is illegally placed
  `nested/guardrail3-rs.toml` is attached to non-member root `nested`. Workspace-local `deps` files must live at the workspace root `.`.
[Error] g3rs-topology/workspace-local-file-placement nested/guardrail3-rs.toml `garde` file `nested/guardrail3-rs.toml` is illegally placed
  `nested/guardrail3-rs.toml` is attached to non-member root `nested`. Workspace-local `garde` files must live at the workspace root `.`.
